name: unofficial-fortimonitor-browser-plugin-tests
description: Repo-root tooling for E2E tests. The extension itself lives under extension/ with its own package.json; this manifest exists only to host the Playwright dev-dep and the test:e2e script.

scripts.test:e2e:ollama-live: OLLAMA_LIVE=1 playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.js --grep='live - Ask AI'
